lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਗਾਖਰੋ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਕਉਨ ਛੁਟਿਓ ਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh ahankaar gaakharo sanjam kaun chhuttio ree |
lines.english: How have you escaped from the treachery of sexual desire, anger and egotism?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਦੇਵ ਅਸੁਰ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਨੀਆ ਸਗਲੋ ਭਵਨੁ ਲੁਟਿਓ ਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sur nar dev asur trai guneea sagalo bhavan luttio ree |1|
lines.english: The holy beings, angels and demons of the three qualities, and all the worlds have been plundered. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਵਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਣ ਜਾਲੇ ਕੋਈ ਹਰਿਆ ਬੂਟੁ ਰਹਿਓ ਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: daavaa agan bahut trin jaale koee hariaa boott rahio ree |
lines.english: The forest fire has burnt down so much of the grass; how rare are the plants which have remained green.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੋ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਵਰਨਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਉ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਉਪਮਾ ਜਾਤ ਨ ਕਹਿਓ ਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aiso samarath varan na saakau taa kee upamaa jaat na kahio ree |2|
lines.english: He is so All-powerful, that I cannot even describe Him; no one can chant His Praises. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਬਸਿਓ ਅਚਰਜ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਨਿਓ ਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mahaa mantru gur hiradai basio acharaj naam sunio ree |3|
lines.english: The Guru has implanted the Maha Mantra, the Great Mantra, within my heart, and I have heard the wondrous Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਜਰ ਕੋਠ ਮਹਿ ਭਈ ਨ ਕਾਰੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਰਨੁ ਬਨਿਓ ਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaajar kotth meh bhee na kaaree niramal baran banio ree |
lines.english: In the store-room of the lamp-black, I did not turn black; my color remained immaculate and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਦਰਿ ਅਵਲੋਕਨ ਅਪੁਨੈ ਚਰਣਿ ਲਗਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh nadar avalokan apunai charan lagaaee |
lines.english: Showing His Mercy, God has looked upon me with favor, and He has attached me to His feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੪॥੧੨॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: prem bhagat naanak sukh paaeaa saadhoo sang samaaee |4|12|51|
lines.english: Through loving devotional worship, O Nanak, I have obtained peace; in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I am absorbed into the Lord. ||4||12||51||
That red dress looks so beautiful on your body.
Raag Aasaa, Seventh House, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Your Husband Lord is pleased, and His heart is enticed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਰੰਗਿ ਤੂੰ ਭਈ ਗੁਲਾਲੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kavan rang toon bhee gulaalee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whose love has rendered the poppy so red? ||1||Pause||
Whose handiwork is this red beauty of yours?
You are so beautiful; you are the happy soul-bride.
You are pure and chaste, you are most distinguished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਘਰਿ ਲਾਲਨੁ ਤੁਮ ਘਰਿ ਭਾਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tum ghar laalan tum ghar bhaag |2|
lines.english: Your Beloved is in your home; good fortune is in your home. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਭਾਨੀ ਤੁਹੀ ਸੁਰ ਗਿਆਨਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: toon preetam bhaanee tuhee sur giaan |3|
lines.english: You are pleasing to Your Beloved, and you have sublime understanding. ||3||
I am pleasing to my Beloved, and so I am imbued with the deep red color.
Says Nanak, I have been totally blessed with the Lord's Glance of Grace. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਿ ਰੀ ਸਖੀ ਇਹ ਹਮਰੀ ਘਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: sun ree sakhee ih hamaree ghaal |
lines.english: Listen, O companions: this is my only work;
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਿ ਸੀਗਾਰਿ ਸਵਾਰਨਹਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੧॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: prabh aap seegaar savaaranahaar |1| rahaau doojaa |1|52|
lines.english: God Himself is the One who embellishes and adorns. ||1||Second Pause||1||52||
I suffered in pain, when I thought He was far away;
but now, He is Ever-present, and I receive His instructions. ||1||
My pride is gone, O friends and companions;
My Beloved has drawn me near to Him, and seated me on His Bed;
I have escaped the clutches of others. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੁ ਗਇਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਪਿਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੇਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bharam geaa gur pir sang meree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: my doubt is dispelled, and the Guru has united me with my Beloved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਮੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: masatak bhaag mai pir ghar aaeaa |
lines.english: According to the destiny written upon my forehead, my Husband Lord has come home to me.
My Husband Lord is blissful and playful. ||3||
In the mansion of my heart, shines the Light of the Shabad.
Servant Nanak has obtained the eternal marriage. ||4||2||53||
My mind is attached to the True Name.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
Outwardly, I am on good terms with all;
My dealings with other people are only superficial. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਰਹਉ ਜੈਸੇ ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਕਉਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: alipat rhau jaise jal meh kaulaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: but I remain detached, like the lotus upon the water. ||1||Pause||
but I keep God clasped to my heart. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖ ਕੀ ਬਾਤ ਸਗਲ ਸਿਉ ਕਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: mukh kee baat sagal siau karataa |
lines.english: By word of mouth, I talk with everyone;
I may appear utterly terrible,
Servant Nanak has found the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਚਰਨ ਕੀ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਲਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sagal charan kee ihu man raalaa |3|
lines.english: but my mind is the dust of all men's feet.
